title: Notification dated 03.07.2009 under DMC Act, 1957
text: -- 1 of 5 -- -- 2 of 5 -- [To be published in the Gazette of India Part-I, Section-2] No.14016/39/2002-UTS-II Government of India Ministry of Home Affairs * * * * * North Block, New Delhi-110 001. Dated, the 17th February, 2009. N O T I F I C A T I O N Consequent upon the recommendation of the Review Departmental Promotion Committee (DPC) held on 9th October, 2007 in continuation of its meeting held on 24th July, 2007 to review the recommendations of the Review DPC held on 15th February, 2005 and for preparing the year-wise panels for the year 1998 to 2002 for appointment to Grade-I (Selection Grade) of NCT of Delhi, Andaman & Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman & Diu and Dadra & Nagar Haveli Civil Services (DANICS) in the pay scale of pay of Rs.10,000-325-15,200/- (pre-revised) and in superssession of the Ministry of Home Affairs’ notifications of even number dated 11th April, 2005 and 12th May 2005, the President is pleased to appoint the following Entry Grade officers of the Service to the Selection Grade of the Service with effect from the dates indicated against their names:- Sl. No. Name of Officer (S/Shri) Date of Birth Date of appointment to Selection Grade 1 G.S. Rawat 03.12.1948 06.01.1998 2 Girdhari Lal Meena (ST) 15.01.1959 09.01.1998 3 Devender Singh 02.08.1943 19.02.1998 4 Kuldeep Pakkad (ST) 01.09.1960 09.03.1998 5 Chokha Ram Garg 04.07.1964 16.03.1998 6 Alok Ajmera 12.06.1963 18.03.1998 7 A.S. Chief Secretary, Andaman & Nicobar Islands Administration, Port Blair. 3. Administrator, Lakshadweep Administration, Kavaratti. 4. Administrators, Daman & Diu and Dadra & Nagar Haveli Administration, Moti Daman. 5. Secretary, UPSC, Dholpur House, Shahjahan Road, New Delhi, with reference to their letter No.5/3/2006-AIS dated 23rd October, 2007. 6. Officers concerned through their respective Chief Secretaries/ Administrators. 7. NIC, MHA for uploading this Notification on MHA (UT Division)’s website on priority basis. 8. Guard file. { J.K.
